message:
feat(engine): add three deep enrichment integration test suites

Add 250 new integration tests across three modules with the
lowest test-to-size coverage ratios:

- obstruction_certificate (85 tests): multi-violation mixed scenarios,
  budget boundary conditions, witness truncation, disruption cost
  scaling/capping, feasibility edge cases, determinism, report rendering,
  serde round-trips, certificate/plan/action ID uniqueness

- shape_transition_algebra (79 tests): multi-step transition chains,
  transition table caching, shape interning/dedup, error edge cases,
  PropertyAttributes combinations, prototype writes, invalidation
  receipt completeness, fingerprint determinism, slot index correctness,
  large-scale stress, PropertyCellTracker lifecycle, bundle emission

- aara_resource_certificate (86 tests): EffectSummary composition
  semantics, SymbolicPotential edge cases, ResourceBound boundary
  conditions, certificate verdict paths, bundle aggregates, hash
  determinism, assumption surfaces, large-scale stress, end-to-end
  multi-region certification pipeline

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
